prompt: Replace the color of the umbrella in image 1 with the umbrella from image 3, and replace the dog in image 1 with the cat from image 2. Maintain the geometric cubist style of image 1 when applying these edits.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the large red umbrella held by the woman in the top-right with the multi-colored, segmented umbrella from image 3, adopting its distinctive pattern and colors. Simultaneously, replace the bulldog on a leash in the bottom-left with the cubist cat from image 2. All modifications must seamlessly integrate and strictly adhere to the geometric cubist art style, color palette, and textures of image 1.
objects: Multi-colored, segmented umbrella (held by the woman in the top-right)
Large red umbrella (should not be present)
Bulldog on a leash (should not be present)
